nomad._comment: VENDOR-ONLY: repoUrl is ALWAYS empty and MUST stay empty — the Nomad component NEVER clones. It installs only from the bundled vendor/nomad-src (main.js sets HM_NOMAD_SRC); if not bundled it skips gracefully (exit 120). Removing the clone path closes the round-7 TOCTOU P0 (foreign pyproject.toml swapped between Test-Path and git clone). packageName matches pyproject [project].name.

cloud._comment: The friend's local Nomad routes LLM traffic through the owner's cloud control-plane (OpenAI-compatible) — no VPN, no personal model key required — OR the friend uses any neural net by its own API key via `nmd model`. baseUrl is written into HERMES_HOME/config.yaml as a custom provider only when the friend pastes their OWN cabinet key (HM_NOMAD_CLOUD_KEY). The owner's key is NEVER embedded. defaultModel MUST be a model id that cp.nomadnet.ai/v1/models actually serves — confirm and adjust.

dashboard._comment: Local Nomad web dashboard. `nmd dashboard` starts the SPA + API on this port.

bridge._comment: AI-мост: стабильный IP только для ИИ-доменов через SSH. enrollEndpoint пуст => агент простаивает, пока бот не выдаст доступ. Впиши адрес bridge enroll-сервиса (server/enroll-ssh-server.js), когда купишь сервер.

finish._comment_startHtml: Оффлайн-чеклист «Первые 10 минут» (бандлится в resources/assets). Фолбэк, когда links.video пуст.
